justifications.clarity: Prose opens with a narrative anchor (Tetlock 2006 spreadsheet) before introducing formalism, and each section transitions explicitly using its predecessor's limitations as motivation.
justifications.rigor: All formal definitions carry precise mathematical notation; identification challenges are named and explained; SGNS gradient updates are stated and interpreted.
justifications.completeness: All seven learning objectives are substantively addressed; TF-IDF worked example is numerically complete; Word2Vec NEG, GloVe, domain adaptation, and PCA case study are covered with appropriate depth.
justifications.pedagogy: Seven learning objectives are explicitly listed; difficulty progresses from accessible narrative to gradient-level mathematics; BERT is glossed at first use; practical-session dependency is correctly flagged in LO 4.
justifications.style: Writing is direct after the editor pass; notation is consistent throughout; markdown header hierarchy is correct; BOOK-ONLY comment placed appropriately.
